ocr_snippet: HAEATOGLOBIN 9.0 g/dl RBC COUNT 3.66 million/µL MCV 76.8 fL MCH 24.6 pg MCHC 32.0 % PLATELET COUNT 495 WBC 9.72 x 1000/µL LYMPHOCYTE 38 % NEUTROPHIL 50 – 450 x 1000/µL A 6 year old male child came with the above mentioned complaints. On examination child was dull, blanchable rash, purpura, revealed pallor. Head to toe examination was normal. On P/A examination hepatosplenomegaly was noted.
